title: Stop-hook dedup ledger
description: Schema for .scrum/stop-gate.json. Records the most recent <phase, fingerprint> pair seen by the Stop hook (hooks/completion-gate.sh, via hooks/lib/stop-gate-state.sh) plus a counter of how many times the same situation has re-blocked. Used in human (non-autonomous) mode to suppress repeated identical Stop blocks: the first block is emitted verbosely; subsequent blocks of the same <phase, fingerprint> are logged-only and allowed. Resets to count=1 on phase change or fingerprint change. Writers: stop_gate_check_and_bump only.

phase.description: The state.json phase at the time of the recorded block (e.g. 'review', 'sprint_review', 'pbi_pipeline_active').

fingerprint.description: Stable identifier of the block-triggering situation within the phase (e.g. 'review_incomplete:pbi-001,pbi-003', 'sprint_history_missing:sprint-002'). Caller-defined; any change resets block_count to 1.

block_count.description: Number of consecutive Stop blocks observed for the current <phase, fingerprint>. Starts at 1.

first_block_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the first block recorded for the current <phase, fingerprint>.

last_block_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent block recorded for the current <phase, fingerprint>. Refreshed on every REPEAT.
